name: optimize-landing-page
description: 8-layer CRO audit of a landing page. Always re-fetches a fresh landing-page-summary. Returns top 3 prioritized fixes with verbatim current->replace prescriptions plus an A/B test queue.

installs.purpose: Global INDEX.md routing entry for the saved-audits library. The skill itself is auto-discovered via Runneth's available-skills mechanism and is intentionally not indexed (per Runneth's rule: do not index /agent/.agents/skills/).

changelog.notes: Added post-install intro. After install completes, Runneth surfaces a short 'what just opened up + try this now' message sourced from post-install-intro.md.

changes: Always invokes landing-page-summary fresh; never reads a saved summary directly
Workflow framing made explicit: creatives -> destination URL -> audit-against-ads
Durable audit history at /agent/brain/cro-audits/<slug>--<domain>/<YYYY-MM-DD>.md preserves per-page audit changelog
Fallback to WebFetch when landing-page-summary is not installed

post-install.name: Introduce the new capability
post-install.description: Read post-install-intro.md from this use case folder. After all prior install and post-install steps complete, surface the file's sections to the user in chat as the closing message of the install turn: '## What just opened up' as prose, '## Try this now' as a numbered prompt list, '## Compounds with' only when present and at least one named use case is installed in the sandbox. Resolve any {{TOKEN}} placeholders using the same customize map applied during install.
